title: The End Update
description:
Minecraft refuses to make an end update, so I did it myself.

This mod only requires Fabric API to run.
body:
An end update has been one of Minecraft's most requested features for a while now, so I decided to put my own spin on it. Before this project, I had no exposure to coding at all. I'm still learning, and I'm 100% certain that some things are handled sub-optimally. This project was done with lots of AI assistance--I've learned a lot by reverse-engineering it, but I've definitely got a long road ahead of me. If you know what you're doing with modding, and would like to help out, feel free to join my discord server & say hi, or create pull requests on the github.



Showcase/Trailer with full feature breakdown:

(Features are also showcased in the gallery page)



Thanks,
-Ritro
